item.title: Khaleda Zia to receive 'Best Indomitable Woman in Advancing Democracy' award
item.description: The Ministry of Women and Children Affairs will confer the 'Best Indomitable Woman in Advancing Democracy (Gonotantra er Ogrojatray Sreshtho Odommo Nari)' award on Begum Khaleda Zia. It will be given to her under the Indomitable Women Award programme marking International Women's Day 2026. The aw
